rivalries.name: Chiefs vs. Bills
rivalries.summary: The defining AFC rivalry of the Mahomes era. Mahomes is 4-1 vs. Allen in the playoffs. The 13-second collapse, the OT classic, the constant January heartbreak for Buffalo.

rivalries.name: Eagles vs. Cowboys
rivalries.summary: The most-hated NFC East rivalry. Eagles fans throw batteries; Cowboys fans claim America's Team status. The Hurts vs. Dak comparison runs deep.

rivalries.name: Packers vs. Bears
rivalries.summary: The oldest rivalry in football (1921). Bears have lost 23 of the last 26. The 'Bears still suck' Packers fan culture is permanent.

rivalries.name: 49ers vs. Seahawks
rivalries.summary: Harbaugh-vs-Carroll era set the modern tone. The Sherman tip in the 2014 NFC Championship is the defining moment.

rivalries.name: Steelers vs. Ravens
rivalries.summary: The most physically violent rivalry in football. Defensive wars. Ben vs. Joe Flacco vs. Lamar.

rivalries.name: Patriots vs. Jets
rivalries.summary: Belichick's 25-year domination of the Jets is the longest-running comedy in football. Jets fans have suffered.

owner_drama: Jerry Jones — 36 years owning the Cowboys, no Super Bowl since 1995. Acts as his own GM. Famously bad at letting go.
Dan Snyder finally sold the Commanders in 2023 after years of investigations. The franchise immediately got watchable.
David Tepper (Panthers) has burned through coaches and has the worst owner reputation in the NFL.
Robert Kraft + Bill Belichick split was the messiest divorce in modern NFL — coach and owner stopped speaking, eventually parted in 2024.
The Walton-Penner group bought the Broncos for $4.65B in 2022 — record sale price.

scandals.name: Spygate (2007)
scandals.summary: Patriots caught filming Jets defensive signals. NFL fined Belichick $500K and stripped a 1st-rd pick. Set off two decades of Patriots-cheating accusations.

scandals.name: Deflategate (2014-15)
scandals.summary: Brady accused of using under-inflated footballs. Suspended 4 games. The investigation cost millions. Brady won 3 more rings after.

scandals.name: Bountygate (2012)
scandals.summary: Saints' DC Gregg Williams ran a bounty system rewarding hits that injured opponents. Sean Payton suspended for a full year.

scandals.name: Deshaun Watson allegations (2021-22)
scandals.summary: 20+ massage therapists filed civil suits alleging sexual misconduct. Watson settled most cases. Browns traded for him + gave him $230M guaranteed.

scandals.name: Tua Tagovailoa concussion protocol (2022)
scandals.summary: Tua's multiple concussions in 2022 led to the league overhauling its protocols. Critics said the changes came too late.

viral_moments: The Helmet Catch — David Tyree, Super Bowl XLII (2008), beat the undefeated Patriots.
The Music City Miracle — Titans wild card vs. Bills (2000), home-run throwback.
The 28-3 collapse — Falcons vs. Patriots, Super Bowl LI (2017). Permanent meme.
The Philly Special — Eagles vs. Patriots, Super Bowl LII (2018). Foles to Foles.
Mahomes' first ring — Super Bowl LIV comeback vs. 49ers (2020).
The Tush Push controversy — Eagles' QB sneak that the league has tried to ban for 3 years.
Travis Kelce / Andy Reid sideline argument — Super Bowl LVIII.
Tom Brady's last game (Buccaneers, 2022 wild card loss) — visible tears.
memes: 'Same Old Browns' — the franchise's identity for decades.
'Bills Mafia' table-jumping — turned a fanbase into a brand.
Andy Reid Time Management memes — every late-game clock decision gets dissected.
Sean McVay 'Smart Coach' memes vs. Mike McCarthy 'Run It Twice' memes.
Mr. Irrelevant (Brock Purdy) becoming the actual Mr. Relevant.
Kyler Murray's contract clause about studying film for 4 hours.
The Rams 'F them picks' winning Super Bowl LVI.
ongoing_storylines: Will the Mahomes Chiefs win 4 in 5? They're already at 3.
Can Caleb Williams + Ben Johnson save the Bears?
How much longer does Aaron Rodgers play?
Will the league finally ban the Tush Push?
Can Joe Burrow stay healthy for a full season?
Has Brian Callahan (Titans) figured it out yet?
Will the Jets ever escape the Jets curse?
Is Jordan Love a top-5 QB or just a Packer?

rivalries.name: Lakers vs. Celtics
rivalries.summary: The original NBA rivalry. 12 Finals matchups. Magic vs. Bird. Kobe vs. KG. Now LeBron-era vs. Tatum-era. Always personal.

rivalries.name: Thunder vs. Nuggets
rivalries.summary: Modern Western Conference battle. Jokic vs. SGA. The 2024 conference semis went 7 games. 2025 rematch likely.

rivalries.name: 76ers vs. Celtics
rivalries.summary: Eastern Conference enemies. Embiid vs. Tatum. Tobias Harris's contract jokes. The Process vs. The Patriots-equivalent.

rivalries.name: Warriors vs. Clippers
rivalries.summary: Same building (Crypto.com / Chase). Both LA-area, but Clippers will never beat Lakers in heart. Curry vs. Harden modern era.

rivalries.name: Bucks vs. Celtics
rivalries.summary: Giannis vs. Tatum. Two of the East's top talents. The 'who's the East alpha' debate runs through them.

owner_drama: Donald Sterling's 2014 racism scandal — recordings leaked, league forced a sale to Steve Ballmer.
Robert Sarver (Suns) sold in 2023 after racism/sexism investigation revealed a toxic workplace.
James Dolan (Knicks) has banned multiple journalists, fired employees over Reddit comments, and refuses to attend most games. NYC tabloid catnip.
Mark Cuban sold majority of the Mavericks to the Adelson family in 2024 — speculation about gambling/casino angle.
Joe Lacob (Warriors) is famously the most-hated owner in the league. Constantly says provocative things in pressers.

scandals.name: KD's Burner Account Saga (2017-present)
scandals.summary: Kevin Durant has run multiple anonymous Twitter accounts (most recently @gethigher77) targeting his own teammates. He defended himself in third person from his real account in 2017. Has never fully admitted it.

scandals.name: Ja Morant Suspensions (2023)
scandals.summary: Ja was suspended twice in 18 months for showing guns on Instagram Live. The second suspension was 25 games.

scandals.name: Jontay Porter NBA Gambling Ban (2024)
scandals.summary: Jontay Porter (Raptors) was permanently banned from the NBA for betting on his own games. Sent ripples through the league about gambling oversight.

scandals.name: Constant Tampering Fines
scandals.summary: Every star free agent move involves accusations of pre-arranged deals. The league fines teams (and rarely individuals) for it. Pat Riley is the king of subtle tampering.

scandals.name: Load Management Crackdown (2023)
scandals.summary: League introduced rules requiring stars to play in nationally-televised games and All-Star considerations. Kawhi Leonard and Joel Embiid are the patron saints of load management.

viral_moments: The Decision — LeBron's 2010 ESPN special leaving Cleveland for Miami.
Kobe's 81-point game (2006) and his last game (60 points, 2016).
Steph's unanimous MVP season (73 wins, 2016) — and the Finals collapse.
Klay Thompson's 14 threes in a half (2018).
Jokic winning the 2023 Finals MVP — 'this is the best basketball player in the world'.
The Luka trade — February 2025, broke the league.
'Heart Attack' Allen Iverson stepover on Tyronn Lue (2001 Finals).
Dillon Brooks talking trash to LeBron and getting eliminated by him.
memes: 'Trust the Process' — the longest-running NBA meme (Sixers since 2014).
'Cookin' — Michael Malone yelling at Jokic to call timeouts.
'They saying he's a B-tier center' — Embiid quote about himself.
'I would've shot it' — every NBA player Twitter pundit's catchphrase.
'This is a good basketball move' — euphemism for ridiculous flop.
'Dame Time' — every clutch shot Lillard hits.
Jokic's blank stares at his coach.
Wemby blocking shots and looking apologetic.
'Daddy chill' — TJ Warren's brother yelling at refs.
ongoing_storylines: Can OKC win it all? They're the youngest team to be the favorite ever.
Will LeBron + Bronny + Luka + AD pull off a Lakers championship?
Is Wemby the future face of the league?
Will Jokic get a 4th MVP — and how do voters not vote for him?
What does the Heat do post-Jimmy Butler?
Is Cade Cunningham the new face of small-market hope?
Will Anthony Edwards be the next Jordan-tier marketing star?
